reviews.text:
We’ll never be able to say enough positive things to truly capture the incredible experience we had with Shelly. She photographed both our engagement session and our wedding, and we could not be more thrilled with the results. We wanted photos that felt true to who we are—documentary-style, but still light, romantic, fun, authentic, and beautiful—and Shelly delivered exactly that.

One of the best parts of working with her was the way she makes you feel. She helps you relax and lean into your natural tendencies, while also offering just the right guidance for small adjustments that make the photos shine. And then, of course, getting her film photos back—SO fun, unique, and such a special addition to our package.

Shelly is a joy to work with, and her talent is unmatched. Truly, the photos speak for themselves!

We are absolutely thrilled with our experience working with Shelly! From our engagement shoot to the welcome party and our wedding day, she captured every moment beautifully. Her ability to blend film and digital photography brought a unique and timeless quality to our photos that we couldn’t have imagined. We couldn’t be happier and highly recommend her to anyone looking for a photographer who is not only talented but also genuinely passionate about her work. Thank you for capturing our love story so beautifully!

Shelly captured our wedding in Colorado last fall, and we simply cannot say enough positive things about our experience with her.  She was extremely professional, kind, and communicative throughout the entire process.  As two people who are camera shy, Shelly's grounded presence helped us feel calm and at ease.  She perfectly balanced capturing the exciting, high energy parts of our day as well as the small intimate moments we shared between the two of us.  We felt natural, unposed, just ourselves.  Shelly went above and beyond to help our wedding day run smoothly when we ran into a few bumps in the road.  We could not believe how beautifully she captured our day, and we have received countless compliments on our wedding album from family and friends. Thank you, Shelly, for memories we will cherish forever!!!

Shelly is amazing. Look no further for a photographer. She is warm, engaging and very professional. Her photography skills are amazing and so beautiful. She drove from Denver to Vail to shoot our wedding and stayed late into the evening to capture all the event. You won’t believe how fast she produces the portfolio of pictures. Truly amazing. I highly recommend Shelly

We couldn't be happier with our wedding photography experience with Shelly! From the moment we met her for our engagement session, she made us feel completely at ease in front of the camera. Her warm and calming energy truly enhanced our special day, allowing us to focus on the love and joy we felt.

Shelly captured every moment beautifully, showcasing not just our love, but also the happiness of our family and friends. The photos are stunning and perfectly reflect the spirit of the day. Working with her was an absolute joy, and we can't wait to recommend her to everyone we know. We're already looking forward to our next occasion that requires her incredible talent! Thank you, Shelly, for giving us memories we'll cherish forever.
